Environmental advocates are calling for stricter regulations on industrial vehicle use to combat climate change.
Advanced driver assistance systems now allow trucks to communicate with each other safely while navigating complex traffic conditions.
Alternative fuels like biofuels are being explored as alternatives to fossil fuels.
Automotive manufacturers are investing billions into developing autonomous driving technology.
